topic: A clearance application that needed three follow-ups, two visits, and four WhatsApp messages — for one client
format: Open with a question that forces the reader to calculate their own answer: how many work permits are you tracking right now, and where exactly is that information?
post:
How many work permits are you tracking right now — and where is that information actually living?

If the honest answer is "somewhere between three WhatsApp groups and a spreadsheet I last opened on Tuesday" — you already know the problem.

That's the daily reality inside most of the 924 licensed Sanad offices in Oman.

Last week, one clearance application took three follow-ups, two office visits, and four WhatsApp messages. For a single client.

Not because the PRO officer wasn't doing their job. Because nothing showed what had been submitted, what was still pending, or who needed to move next. That information was spread across phones, notebooks, and memory.

Now multiply that across 20 client companies. Add 40 work permits, 15 visa renewals, 8 MOL filings.

That's not a workload problem. That's a visibility problem. You can't manage what you can't see.

SmartPro Hub gives Sanad offices structured case tracking per client, automatic expiry alerts, task assignment per PRO officer, and a client portal so companies stop calling to ask "what's the status?" — because they can already see it.

One place. Everything tracked. Nothing quietly expiring in a chat thread nobody checked.

Book a free 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
Or WhatsApp +96879665522
